_description: Startup / cost-conscious config. Aggressive Haiku defaults, tight budgets, auto-routing enabled at all levels to minimize human interruptions. Copy to .claude/model-routing.json.

autoThresholds._comment: Expanded haiku range 1-4 (default: 1-2) - auto-route more to cheapest model

weights._comment: Boosted keyword weight (0.40 vs default 0.35) - trusts configured category mapping over word-count
